category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a static file deployment tool supporting multiple platforms; official GitHub README describes Uptoc as a static file deployment tool for multiple cloud vendors.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses Uptoc; source_facts.name is uptoc.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation and usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/bonaysoft/uptoc, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies static-file deployment across platforms; official GitHub README describes multi-cloud static file deployment and installation; source_facts source-archive points to the Go-based repository.
